_comment: Static Big-O reference for the Immutable family (SPEC §5.E). Schema matches complexity.json: keyed by <Collection>_<Op>, {time, space}. ALL of 增(Build/AddOne)/删(Remove/RemoveAt/Drain)/改(SetItem) RETURN A NEW INSTANCE (persistent/path-copy) -> space column = bytes allocated for the new instance's changed structure. space note documents path-copy / persistent structural-sharing cost. GC FLOOR CAVEAT: build & single path-copy ops are the GC-heaviest of this family but GetTotalMemory under-resolves their scattered transient allocations in this Mono; a measured 0 means 'below floor', not zero — these space columns are the ground truth.

ImmutableArray_Build.space: O(n) (one contiguous T[]; builder doubles then ToImmutable steals/copies)

ImmutableArray_AddOne.space: O(n) (full array copy: NOT structural-sharing — flat array)

ImmutableArray_SetItem.space: O(n) (full array copy with 1 slot changed)

ImmutableList_Build.space: O(n) (AVL tree of ~n nodes; builder mutates in place then freezes)

ImmutableList_AddOne.space: O(log n) (path-copy: only the root-to-leaf spine is cloned, rest shared)

ImmutableList_Remove.space: O(log n) (O(n) to locate by value via scan + O(log n) path-copy to rebalance)

ImmutableList_SetItem.space: O(log n) (path-copy of spine to the index)

ImmutableDictionary_Build.space: O(n) (hash bucket AVL trees; builder mutates then freezes)

ImmutableDictionary_SetItemOne.space: O(log n) (path-copy of the affected bucket's spine)

ImmutableDictionary_Remove.space: O(log n) (path-copy to rebalance affected bucket)

ImmutableDictionary_SetItem.space: O(log n) (path-copy; existing-key overwrite still allocs new spine)

ImmutableSortedDictionary_Build.space: O(n) (sorted AVL tree of n nodes; builder mutates then freezes)

ImmutableSortedDictionary_SetItem.space: O(log n) (path-copy; existing-key overwrite still allocs new spine)

ImmutableHashSet_Build.space: O(n) (hash bucket AVL trees; builder mutates then freezes)

ImmutableHashSet_AddOne.space: O(log n) (path-copy of affected bucket's spine)

ImmutableHashSet_Remove.space: O(log n) (path-copy to rebalance affected bucket)

ImmutableSortedSet_Build.space: O(n) (sorted AVL tree of n nodes; builder mutates then freezes)

ImmutableQueue_Build.space: O(n) (n Enqueue: each appends 1 node to a persistent forward stack; total n nodes)

ImmutableQueue_Drain.space: O(n) (n Dequeue: forward stack reversed once O(n), then n new queue heads allocated along the chain)

ImmutableStack_Build.space: O(n) (n Push: each prepends 1 cons-node; O(1) per push, n nodes total, tails shared)

ImmutableStack_Drain.space: O(0) measured (n Pop just walks shared tails; NO new nodes allocated — returns existing sub-stacks)

ImmutableStack_Iterate.space: O(1) (struct enumerator walking the linked nodes)
